title: store: sqlite WAL (poll offset + delivered markers), Store trait + Sqlite + Memory
action: Store trait (get/set poll offset; record + list undelivered notifications with delivered_at at-least-once). SqliteStore: rusqlite bundled, WAL, busy-timeout in DSN, embedded migrations all-or-nothing single transaction. MemoryStore for tests. Never stores terminal output or credentials (airemote never-store rule).

prohibitions: Never store terminal output or credentials

verify: cargo test --quiet store && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: Store port: Store trait + SqliteStore (WAL, busy-timeout, embedded all-or-nothing migration, poll offset + at-least-once notification outbox, never stores output/creds) + MemoryStore. Committed a7e4a87.
